title: abronia × alba var. platyphylla
intro: Abronia × alba var. platyphylla, also known as the Desert Marigold or Foothill Abronia, is a rare and endemic succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Abronia × alba var. platyphylla include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight infections. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
